---
title: "English History Reading Books, Adapted to the Requirements of the New Code. With “the Advanced Part”."
---

## English History Reading Books, Adapted to the Requirements of the New Code. With “the Advanced Part”.

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1885
**Genre:** Non-fiction, history, edited selection
**Format:** Edited book

**Publisher:** National Society’s Depository, Broad Sanctuary, London.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
